steps.name: Scenario 1: Display Upcoming Hero Bikes with Price < 4 Lac
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('link', { name: 'Hero Moto Corp', exact: true })
Scroll into view getByRole('link', { name: 'Hero Moto Corp', exact: true })
Click getByRole('link', { name: 'Hero Moto Corp', exact: true })
Scroll into view locator('xpath=(//div[@class="p-15 pt-10 mke-ryt rel"])[1]')
Scenario 2: Extract Popular Used Car Models in Chennai
Scenario 3: Google Login with Invalid Credentials - Multiple Cases
3.3: Empty email field - Click Next without entering email
3.4: Verify login page loads with social providers
